ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province or region where the data was recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the data was recorded */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update on this record */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases reported on that day */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported on that day */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries reported on that day */,
  "case_source" TEXT /* Source of the case data (e.g., hospital, testing site, self-report) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "travel_history" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has recent travel history */,
  "is_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient is vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vaccination if applicable */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_province FOREIGN KEY ("province") REFERENCES provinces ("province_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., Democratic, Monarchy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province or region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country it belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2 province code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where vaccinations were administered */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where vaccinations were administered */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "booster_dose" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  "vaccine_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the vaccine (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, AstraZeneca) */,
  "vaccine_side_effects" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if side effects were reported */,
  "side_effect_details" TEXT /* Description of the side effects if reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the testing site */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province of the testing site */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the testing site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the testing site */,
  "testing_capacity" INTEGER /* Daily testing capacity of the site */,
  "testing_type" TEXT /* Type of tests conducted (e.g., PCR, Antigen) */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation */,
  "test_results_turnaround" TEXT /* Average time to get test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_sites_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_sites_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "common_in_age_group" TEXT /* Age group where the symptom is most common */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the patient */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the symptom reported by the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was diagnosed */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient was hospitalized */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient (e.g., 0-17, 18-65, 65+) */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbid conditions of the patient (e.g., Diabetes, Heart Disease) */,
  "contact_tracing_status" TEXT /* Status of contact tracing (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "isolation_status" TEXT /* Status of isolation (e.g., Home Isolation, Hospital Isolation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_symptom_id FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_id") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare worker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare worker */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the healthcare worker */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the healthcare worker */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the worker is based */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare worker (e.g., Infectious Disease, Pediatrics) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "is_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the worker is vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vaccination if applicable */,
  "vaccine_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the vaccine administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_workers_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., PPE, ventilators) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the resource storage */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the resource is located */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the resource */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the resource */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the hospitalization */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the patient was admitted */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of patient admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of patient discharge */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the hospitalization (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  "ward" TEXT /* Ward where the patient is admitted (e.g., ICU, General) */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  "recovery_progress" TEXT /* Progress of recovery (e.g., Stable, Improving, Deteriorating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the hospital is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the hospital (number of beds) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the hospital */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2 province code of the hospital */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the hospital (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Epidemiology, Data Science) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
